title: Add mock contradiction detection (Golden Test 7)
problem: ticket-009 and ticket-010 build support edges and reconcile scores, but no module detects or preserves contradictions between claims. Golden Test 7 requires that opposing claims about AI and diversity remain distinct and are linked with qualifies or apparent_contradiction_metric_or_condition_difference rather than being flattened.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 7: contradiction detection preserves disagreement.
docs/agents/07_MVP_ACCEPTANCE_TESTS.md Test 7 pass criteria: opposing edges preserved; inter-claim relationship marked qualifies or apparent_contradiction_metric_or_condition_difference.
docs/agents/05_DATA_MODEL.md relationships and relationship_evidence with stance values.
agent_reports/2026-06-11_phase-1_ticket-010_score-reconciliation.md section 15–16: recommends ticket-011 as smallest next step.
fixtures/sources/creativity_ai_diversity_contradiction.txt exists; referenced in scaffold and run contract.
No contradiction_detector module or Golden Test 7 test file yet.
acceptance_criteria: research detect-contradictions --source <source_id> (or equivalent scoped CLI) identifies opposing claims/relationships from mock fixtures without Ollama.

Given base diversity-reduction edge and contradiction fixture source, system preserves both may_reduce and may_increase edges and marks inter-claim or inter-relationship stance as qualifies or apparent_contradiction_metric_or_condition_difference per Golden Test 7.
Neither opposing claim is deleted or overwritten; no vague averaged summary replaces distinct claims.
test_plan: Manual: full spine on fresh --db plus ingest contradiction fixture, run detect-contradictions, verify both edges and qualification/contradiction link
non_goals: Do not implement research queue (Golden Test 9), public export, LangGraph, or theory generation.
Do not implement full skeptic agent or automated resolution of contradictions.
rollback_plan: Revert branch phase-1/ticket-011-mock-contradiction-detection. Delete contradiction/qualification relationship_evidence rows from local SQLite test DBs if needed.
